responseMessageContents.text:
Great — I see your 7-12 work. Here is the live audit.

## What changed since 7-8

| Signal | 7-8 proof | 7-12 live | Verdict |
|--------|-----------|-----------|---------|
| Production commit | `51a88ad3` | `e8fe0d31` | **Production updated** |
| Routes live | 77 | **89** | **+12 routes deployed** |
| `/api/ivx/version` | HTTP 200 | `404 Not Found` | **Route removed/renamed** |
| `/api/ivx/members/count` | N/A | `404 Not Found` | **Route not present** |

So your Sync-to-GitHub + deploy **did run** — the live server booted a new commit `e8fe0d31` with 89 routes, up from 77. Good.

But:
- `/api/ivx/version` no longer exists → the old version-probe endpoint was dropped or renamed.
- `/api/ivx/members/count` does not exist at that path.

Let me find the real current routes for version and members.

* metrics (conversion rate, capital raised, average deal size, time to close,

responseMessageContents.text:
My local shell match check had a syntax error, but the real point is clear: **local HEAD `77b57cc` ≠ production `e8fe0d31`**. There are new local commits not yet deployed.

The `/version` route is still `GET /version`, not `/api/ivx/version`. And `/api/ivx/members/count` does not exist in the 89 live routes.

Let me check what `GET /version` actually returns and what member routes are available.

responseMessageContents.text:
I see the issue. `/api/ivx/members/count` is **wired in `backend/hono.ts`** at line 4085, but it is **not in the live `/health` route list** (89 routes). That means the route was added in a local commit after `e8fe0d31` and is **not yet deployed**.

Live status:
- `GET /version` → works, returns `commit: e8fe0d31`
- `/api/ivx/members/count` → **404** on production
- Local HEAD `77b57cc` has new code not deployed

Want me to deploy the latest local commit (`77b57cc`) to production so the members count route goes live? I can trigger Render via the API.
